# MetaKeys.IsValidTraceContextValue method

Returns `true` when *value* is a valid W3C `tracestate` OR `baggage` value — accepted if either grammar matches. (R-2.6.2-i)

```csharp
public static bool IsValidTraceContextValue(string value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate trace-context value. |

## Return Value

`true` when the value is a valid `tracestate` or `baggage`.
